# UN Beauty Supply

> Detroit's go-to beauty supply store for 20+ years. Three locations across Metro Detroit serving the community since 2004.

## About
UN Beauty Supply is a family-owned beauty supply chain with stores in Detroit (Gratiot Ave), Madison Heights, and Clinton Township, Michigan.

## What We Carry
- Wigs & hair extensions (600+ styles): Outre, Sensationnel
- Braiding hair
- Styling tools: BaByliss, Andis
- Hair care: Mielle, Cantu, Shea Moisture, The Mane Choice, Design Essentials
- Skincare, edge control, and more

## Locations
- Detroit — 7651 Gratiot Ave, Detroit MI 48213 | (313) 922-8995
- Madison Heights — 31075 John R Rd, Madison Heights MI 48071 | (248) 291-5022
- Clinton Township — 33870 Southbound Gratiot Ave, Clinton Township MI 48035 | (586) 792-4432

## Hours
Mon–Sat: 9:30am–8pm (Detroit/Madison Heights), 9am–8pm (Clinton Township)
Sunday: 10:30am–6pm (Detroit/Madison Heights), 10am–6pm (Clinton Township)
